import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 27, 
    'description': 'v27 reactive heuristic (OA strictly gated by detector<0.25+min_front<0.9 turn-to-open-side via left_d>right_d correct sign, backup if dist<0.9|min_front<0.6, follow on detector>0.1|dist<3.5 at base=0.26+0.18*err clipped[0.1,0.45], pure-rotate >0.4rad linear=0 + ang_k=-8, seek=0.75 when far, robust depth valid>0.05 center35-65% sides30%, per-step safe/streak/max_streak/detector/coll tracking with exact config angle+compass, improved collision_delta, full JSON contract). Tuned from v26 for reduced collisions, tighter facing, better speed-match/persistence vs dynamic oracle. Targets longer safe accumulation.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v27 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v27 improves OA gating, pure-rotate@0.4rad, ang_k=7-8, base_follow=0.26, err_gain=0.18, wider depth center, stricter detector for OA to prevent human-as-obstacle turns.')
